name: Baga Beach
description: Popular beach known for water sports, shacks, and nightlife.

name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
description: UNESCO World Heritage Site with the remains of St. Francis Xavier.

name: Candolim Market
description: Vibrant local market with handicrafts, spices, and souvenirs.

name: Old Goa Heritage Walk
description: Walk through old Portuguese-era churches and monuments.

name: Calangute Beach Water Sports
description: Parasailing, jet skiing, banana boat rides and more.

name: Anjuna Flea Market
description: Famous Wednesday flea market with clothes, antiques, and food.

name: Gateway of India
description: Iconic arch monument overlooking the Arabian Sea.

name: Marine Drive
description: The Queen's Necklace — a 3.6km promenade along the sea.

name: Elephanta Caves
description: UNESCO Heritage cave temples on Elephanta Island.

name: Colaba Causeway
description: Popular street shopping area in South Mumbai.

name: Amber Fort
description: Magnificent 16th-century fort built from red sandstone and marble.

name: Hawa Mahal
description: Palace of Winds — iconic pink facade with 953 windows.

name: City Palace Jaipur
description: Royal palace complex with museums and courtyards.

name: Jantar Mantar
description: UNESCO World Heritage astronomical observatory.

name: Backwater Cruise Alleppey
description: Houseboat cruise through Kerala's famous backwaters.

name: Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary
description: Spot elephants, tigers, and exotic birds in their natural habitat.

name: Munnar Tea Gardens
description: Sprawling tea plantations in the misty Western Ghats.

name: Rohtang Pass
description: High-altitude mountain pass with snow activities and scenic views.

name: Solang Valley
description: Valley offering skiing, zorbing, and paragliding.

name: Hadimba Temple
description: Ancient wood temple dedicated to Hadimba Devi.

name: Old Manali Market
description: Quaint bazaar with cafes, local crafts, and hippie vibe.

name: Taj Mahal
description: One of the Seven Wonders of the World — a UNESCO Heritage Site.

name: Agra Fort
description: Massive Mughal fortress with palaces, mosques, and courtyards.

name: Fatehpur Sikri
description: Abandoned Mughal city declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

name: India Gate Delhi
description: War memorial and iconic landmark at the heart of New Delhi.
